response:
```python
strongest = extensions[0]
max_strength = sum(1 for c in extensions[0] if c.isupper()) - sum(1 for c in extensions[0] if c.islower())

for ext in extensions[1:]:
    current_strength = sum(1 for c in ext if c.isupper()) - sum(1 for c in ext if c.islower())
    if current_strength > max_strength:
        strongest = ext
        max_strength = current_strength

return f"{class_name}.{strongest}"
```
